name: AI Coding Assistant — Platform Comparison
description: Cross-platform comparison dashboard for AI coding assistants (Claude Code, Cursor, Windsurf, Copilot). All widgets FACET by platform for side-by-side metrics. Requires platform attribute on AiToolCall events.

nrqlQuery.query: SELECT uniques(session_id) FROM AiToolCall SINCE 7 days ago LIMIT 100

pages.name: AI Coding Assistant — Platform Comparison
pages.description: Compare AI coding assistant platforms across efficiency, cost, tool usage, and anti-patterns

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT uniqueCount(platform) AS 'Platforms' FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT uniqueCount(session_id) FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE success = true) FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT average(duration_ms) FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT percentage(count(*), WHERE success = false) FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform SINCE 7 days ago

widgets.title: Avg Tool Calls per Session by Platform

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) / uniqueCount(session_id) AS 'Calls/Session' FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform SINCE 7 days ago

widgets.title: Weekly Tool Call Trend by Platform

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT count(*) FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform TIMESERIES 1 week SINCE 4 weeks ago
SELECT sum(estimated_cost_usd) FROM AiCodingTask {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform SINCE 7 days ago

widgets.title: Avg Cost per Task by Platform

nrqlQueries.query: SELECT average(estimated_cost_usd) FROM AiCodingTask {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT sum(estimated_cost_usd) FROM AiCodingTask {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform TIMESERIES 1 week SINCE 4 weeks ago
SELECT count(*) FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET tool, platform SINCE 7 days ago LIMIT 20
SELECT count(*) FROM AiAntiPattern {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET type, platform SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET model, platform SINCE 7 days ago
SELECT count(*) FROM AiToolCall {{#session_id}} WHERE session_id = '{{session_id}}' {{/session_id}} FACET platform SINCE 7 days ago

rawConfiguration.text:
## Platform Feature Coverage

| Feature | Claude Code | Cursor | Windsurf | Copilot | Generic MCP |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| Built-in tool calls | ✅ Native hooks | ✅ MCP proxy | ✅ MCP proxy | ✅ VS Code extension | ✅ Manual reporting |
| MCP proxy data | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ | ✅ |
| Token counts | ✅ Hook events | ⚠️ Limited | ⚠️ Limited | ⚠️ API usage | ❌ Manual only |
| Timing data | ✅ Pre/post hooks | ✅ Inferred | ✅ Inferred | ✅ Event timestamps | ⚠️ If reported |
| Session metadata | ✅ Model, version | ✅ Session ID | ✅ Context ID | ✅ Extension data | ⚠️ Manual |
